html.noise {
  --paper-texture-enabled: 0;
  --paper-grain-image: none;
  --paper-ambient-highlight: rgb(255 255 255 / 0.06);
  --paper-bend-strong: rgb(0 0 0 / 0.014);
  --paper-bend-soft: rgb(0 0 0 / 0.009);
}

html[data-theme='dark'].noise {
  --paper-ambient-highlight: rgb(255 255 255 / 0.024);
  --paper-bend-strong: rgb(255 255 255 / 0.012);
  --paper-bend-soft: rgb(255 255 255 / 0.008);
}

html.noise body::before {
  position: fixed;
  inset: 0;
  content: '';
  pointer-events: none;
  opacity: var(--paper-texture-enabled);
  background-image:
    radial-gradient(
      circle 900px at 50% -8%,
      var(--paper-ambient-highlight) 0%,
      transparent 60%
    ),
    linear-gradient(
      110deg,
      transparent 20%,
      var(--paper-bend-strong) 55%,
      transparent 80%
    ),
    linear-gradient(25deg, transparent 30%, var(--paper-bend-soft) 70%),
    var(--paper-grain-image);
  background-size: 100% 100%, 100% 100%, 100% 100%, 192px 192px;
  background-repeat: no-repeat, no-repeat, no-repeat, repeat;
  background-position: center, center, center, 0 0;
}

@media print {
  html.noise body::before {
    display: none;
  }
}

.code-wrap {
  white-space: break-spaces !important;
  overflow: auto !important;
  word-break: break-word !important;

  pre[class*='language-'],
  code[class*='language-'] {
    white-space: break-spaces !important;

    word-break: break-word !important;

}

.excalidraw .Modal__content {

html[data-theme='dark'] .shiki span {
  color: var(--shiki-dark) !important;
  font-style: var(--shiki-dark-font-style) !important;

cat > apps/web/src/lib/noise.ts <<'EOF'
'use server'

import { PNG } from 'pngjs'

const hexToRbg = (hex: string) => {
  const r = Number.parseInt(hex.slice(1, 3), 16)
  const g = Number.parseInt(hex.slice(3, 5), 16)
  const b = Number.parseInt(hex.slice(5, 7), 16)
  return { r, g, b }
}

const createSeed = (input: string) => {
  let seed = 0x811c9dc5

  for (const char of input) {
    seed ^= char.charCodeAt(0)
    seed = Math.imul(seed, 0x01000193)
  }

  return seed >>> 0
}

const createRandom = (seed: number) => () => {
  let value = (seed += 0x6d2b79f5)
  value = Math.imul(value ^ (value >>> 15), value | 1)
  value ^= value + Math.imul(value ^ (value >>> 7), value | 61)
  return ((value ^ (value >>> 14)) >>> 0) / 4294967296
}

export const createPngNoiseBackground = async (hex: string) => {
  const { b, g, r } = hexToRbg(hex)
  const width = 192
  const height = 192
  const png = new PNG({
    width,
    height,
    filterType: -1,
  })

  const brightness = (r * 299 + g * 587 + b * 114) / 1000
  const noiseChannel = brightness > 150 ? 0 : 255
  const random = createRandom(createSeed(hex))

  for (let y = 0; y < height; y++) {
    for (let x = 0; x < width; x++) {
      const idx = (width * y + x) << 2
      const grain = random()
      const alpha =
        grain > 0.985
          ? Math.round(10 + random() * 10)
          : grain > 0.72
            ? Math.round(1 + random() * 4)
            : 0

      png.data[idx] = noiseChannel
      png.data[idx + 1] = noiseChannel
      png.data[idx + 2] = noiseChannel
      png.data[idx + 3] = alpha
    }
  }

  return new Promise<string>((resolve) => {
    const chunks = [] as Buffer[]
    png
      .pack()
      .on('data', (chunk) => {
        chunks.push(chunk)
      })
      .on('end', () => {
        const buffer = Buffer.concat(chunks)
        resolve(`url('data:image/png;base64,${buffer.toString('base64')}')`)
      })
  })
}
EOF

import 'server-only'

import chroma from 'chroma-js'
import type { FC } from 'react'

import { generateSingleColorStyle } from '~/lib/accent-color'
import { generateGlowOrbs, renderGlowOrbStyle } from '~/lib/glow.server'

import { RootPortal } from '../ui/portal'

export const PageColorGradient: FC<{
  seed?: string
  baseColor?: string
}> = async ({ seed, baseColor }) => {
  const orbs = generateGlowOrbs({ seed, baseColor })

  const mainOrb = orbs[0]
  const bgAccent = chroma.hsl(mainOrb.hue, mainOrb.saturation / 100, 0.5).hex()

  const cssContent = await generateSingleColorStyle(bgAccent, {
    withNoise: true,
    useThemedClass: true,
    mixRatio: { light: 0.0015, dark: 0.00075 },
  })

  return (
    <>
      <RootPortal>
        <div className="page-glow-container">
          {orbs.map((orb) => (
            <div
              key={orb.id}
              style={
                {
                  ...renderGlowOrbStyle(orb),
                  '--glow-opacity': orb.opacity,
                } as React.CSSProperties
              }
            />
          ))}
          <div className="page-glow-mask" />
        </div>
      </RootPortal>
      <style
        id="accent-color-style"
        dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{
          __html: cssContent,
        }}
      />
    </>
  )
}

import 'server-only'

import { hexToHsl } from './color'

const SOFT_HUES = [
  { name: 'dawn', hue: 25 },
  { name: 'sunrise', hue: 35 },
  { name: 'morning', hue: 45 },
  { name: 'spring', hue: 85 },
  { name: 'sky', hue: 200 },
  { name: 'twilight', hue: 220 },
  { name: 'lavender', hue: 270 },
  { name: 'rose', hue: 340 },
  { name: 'coral', hue: 15 },
  { name: 'mint', hue: 160 },
  { name: 'peach', hue: 20 },
  { name: 'sage', hue: 120 },
]

type GlowShape = 'circle' | 'ellipse-h' | 'ellipse-v' | 'blob'

export interface GlowOrb {
  id: number
  x: number
  y: number
  width: number
  height: number
  blur: number
  opacity: number
  hue: number
  saturation: number
  lightnessLight: number
  lightnessDark: number
  shape: GlowShape
  delay: number
}

function hashString(str: string): number {
  let hash = 0
  for (let i = 0; i < str.length; i++) {
    const char = str.codePointAt(i)!
    hash = (hash << 5) - hash + char
    hash = hash & hash
  }
  return Math.abs(hash)
}

function seededRandom(initialSeed: number): () => number {
  let s = initialSeed
  return function () {
    s = (s * 1103515245 + 12345) & 0x7fffffff
    return s / 0x7fffffff
  }
}

function getShapeBorderRadius(shape: GlowShape): string {
  switch (shape) {
    case 'circle':
    case 'ellipse-h':
    case 'ellipse-v':
      return '50%'
    case 'blob':
      return '60% 40% 30% 70% / 60% 30% 70% 40%'
    default:
      return '50%'
  }
}

function resolveBaseHue(
  seed?: string,
  baseColor?: string,
): { hue: number; hash: number } {
  if (baseColor) {
    const [h] = hexToHsl(baseColor)
    return { hue: h, hash: hashString(baseColor) }
  }
  const hash = hashString(seed!)
  const hueIndex = hash % SOFT_HUES.length
  const baseHue = SOFT_HUES[hueIndex].hue
  const hueOffset = ((hash >> 8) % 30) - 15
  return { hue: (baseHue + hueOffset + 360) % 360, hash }
}

export function generateGlowOrbs(options: {
  seed?: string
  baseColor?: string
}): GlowOrb[] {
  const { hue: baseHue, hash } = resolveBaseHue(options.seed, options.baseColor)
  const random = seededRandom(hash)

  const orbCount = 3 + Math.floor(random() * 4)
  const shapes: GlowShape[] = ['circle', 'ellipse-h', 'ellipse-v', 'blob']
  const orbs: GlowOrb[] = []

  for (let i = 0; i < orbCount; i++) {
    const isMain = i === 0

    const x

  .page-glow-container {
    @apply pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-0 top-0 h-[720px] w-full;

    overflow: hidden;
    animation: fade-in 0.8s ease 0.2s both;

      var(--background, var(--color-root-bg, var(--color-neutral-1))) 100%
    );
  }
"""
new = """@layer components {
  .page-glow-container {
    @apply pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-0 top-0 h-[720px] w-full;

    overflow: hidden;
    animation: fade-in 0.8s ease 0.2s both;
    -webkit-mask-image: linear-gradient(
      180deg,
      rgb(0 0 0 / 100%) 0%,
      rgb(0 0 0 / 100%) 48%,
      rgb(0 0 0 / 72%) 64%,
      rgb(0 0 0 / 24%) 82%,
      transparent 100%
    );
    mask-image: linear-gradient(
      180deg,
      rgb(0 0 0 / 100%) 0%,
      rgb(0 0 0 / 100%) 48%,
      rgb(0 0 0 / 72%) 64%,
      rgb(0 0 0 / 24%) 82%,
      transparent 100%
    );
  }

  .page-glow-mask {
    display: none;
  }
"""
if old not in text:
    raise SystemExit('target block not found')
path.write_text(text.replace(old, new))
PY

pnpm -C apps/web exec tsc --noEmit

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Explaining Background Issues**

I need to be concise since the user asked about a gap in the background. It seems they want an explanation and a solution. I can explain the root cause of the issue and the changes needed. 

If the problem is still visible, I could suggest removing an extra div or further adjusting the fade. Reference line 178 in `apps/web/src/styles/layer.css`. The issue arises from the `.page-glow-mask` having a solid background that covers the texture. To fix this, using a CSS mask-image and extending the height to 720px should work.

_**Agent (gpt-5.4 2026-03-06 13:36:22Z)**_

**Cause**
- 断层是因为旧的 `.page-glow-mask` 用实色背景把发光层“盖回” `--color-root-bg`，这会把纸纹/背景一起盖掉；到了容器底部，真实背景重新出现，于是就有一条线
- 相关位置在 `apps/web/src/styles/layer.css:178`

**Fix**
- 把“实色遮罩”改成“对整个 glow 容器做透明渐隐”
- 同时把容器高度从 `600px` 提到 `720px`，让 fade 在容器结束前已经接近透明
- 现在实现是 `mask-image` / `-webkit-mask-image`，见 `apps/web/src/styles/layer.css:178`
- 旧的 `.page-glow-mask` 已停用，底下纸纹会连续穿过去，不会再在末尾被切断

**Check**
- `pnpm -C apps/web exec tsc --noEmit` 已通过

如果你愿意，我下一步可以顺手把 `apps/web/src/components/common/PageColorGradient.tsx:41` 里的空 `page-glow-mask` 节点也删掉，做个小清理。
